author: y4rr
content: Divergence found in conformance_distributions_discrete::relaxed_bernoulli_fixtures_log_prob. For temp=0.5, probs=0.7, x=0.2: implementation returns 1.6186 but expected -0.7893. The current formula (Maddison eqn 21 direct) produces wrong results. Correct formula (PyTorch source): y=logit(x), diff=logits-y*temp, log_prob_logit=log(temp)+diff-2*softplus(diff), log_prob=log_prob_logit - log(x) - log(1-x). This is the LogitRelaxedBernoulli density plus change-of-variable Jacobian.
